owns: nothing in the shared store; own junk-sender memory
notes: Fires daily after the USPS Informed Delivery digest lands. Path-B pilot: Gmail read-only and no device dependency, so it runs unattended in a managed cloud routine (no laptop). The SKILL's concurrency + freshness guard makes a no-digest-yet run a silent no-op; sys-catchup-controller retries a missed slot only within the same half-day.
